subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Though at every breath I should write unto thee a manifest Book, yet would the fervor of mine utterance be not stilled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم در هر دمی اگر کتابی مبین بتو بنگارم حرارت تقریر ساکن نگردد و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @firmness in the Covenant
